provenance: Instantiated K461/B121 as Phase 2 of multi-Cathedral dogfood. Seeds derived from KNIGHT_QUEUE.md (Bishop-maintained Phase 1 file). Courier auto-populates on rebuild from this point forward.

observation: K461 — Knight Cathedral Instantiation — is the NEXT dispatched task as of B121. Prompt file: BISHOP_DROPZONE/01_KnightPrompts/PROMPT_KNIGHT_K461_B121_KNIGHT_CATHEDRAL_INSTANTIATION.md. Target tag: v-knight-cathedral-instantiation-K461. Estimated: 2-4 hr, Sonnet 4.6, two commits one tag. Prereq gate: K462 (v-session-count-semantics-K462, f2154d2) confirmed green.

K455a — Full Cathedral R11 rerun, all vendors, now multi-Cathedral (Bishop + Knight). Gate: after K461 lands. Scope expands to include Knight-Cathedral arm. Bishop to draft post-K461 (conditions depend on K461 substrate). This is the precondition measurement for A&A #2278 claim 8 cooperative-corpus flywheel.

K455b — Founder-manual Pawn + Cathedral paste, Bishop grades. Gate: after K455a dispatch. Bishop to draft (Founder-playbook format, not typical Knight prompt). Parallel arm to K455a completing the three-probe R11 suite.

K455c — Cross-Cathedral consultation test (Phase 3 dogfood) — confirmed B121 'all the arms'. Gate: after K455a/b lands + Phase 3 MCP client-from-Cursor wiring. Bishop to draft post-K455b. This is the explicit out-of-scope boundary for K461 — cross-Cathedral MCP consultation must NOT be wired in K461.

K463 — Max-session-number swap (knightSessions/bishopSessions → max K#/B# per prefix, not pattern-filtered count). Low priority. K462 values are accurate for pattern but undersell intuition (54/52 vs actual 462/121). Queue after K455a-c. Bishop to draft if elected.

Sessions.json mental model corrected — it is a live MCP-written store, NOT a build artifact. A&A #2278 The Cathedral Effect drafted — CJ#16 candidate for Prov 14.
